pkgmetadata.longdescription: Copy of ::gentoo dev-db/mongodb-8.0.12 with PYTHON_COMPAT extended to python3_14, so the build no longer forces the python3_13 toolchain to stay installed. Drop this package when ::gentoo mongodb gains python3_14 support.

use.flag: Install the MongoDB shell from app-admin/mongosh-bin
Install the MongoDB tools (mongoimport, mongodump...) from app-admin/mongo-tools
